title: Skill Index
description: Generated index of all skills in a Cortex installation, derived from each SKILL.md's front matter. Serves as the single source of truth for the UserPromptSubmit hook, the SkillRecommender, and `cortex skills analyze`.

$schema.description: Relative path to this schema file

generated_from.description: Short label identifying the source of truth; always 'SKILL.md front matter' for current builds

skills.description: Sorted list of skill entries (sorted by name for deterministic output)

name.description: Unique skill identifier (matches the SKILL.md front matter 'name' field)

path.description: Directory path relative to skills/ root, using posix separators (e.g. 'agent-loops' or 'collaboration/brainstorming')

description.description: Human-readable description from the skill's front matter

keywords.description: Keywords or phrases that should surface this skill. Substring-matched against prompts, file paths, and commit messages.

file_patterns.description: Glob patterns that trigger this skill via file-based matching in the SkillRecommender rule strategy.

confidence.description: Default confidence score (0-1) used when a file_patterns match fires
